posts.text: Soft golden hour glow on porcelain skin. Would you believe she's not real? #AIbeauty #AIart #AIgirl

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra-realistic AI-generated portrait of a beautiful young woman, soft golden hour lighting, warm tones, porcelain skin with subtle luminosity, delicate features, light brown wavy hair catching sunlight, shallow depth of field with bokeh background of warm amber and green tones, fashion photography style, 8k resolution, photorealistic
image_prompt.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, deformed, distorted, blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay
image_prompt.style_reference: editorial beauty photography, golden hour portrait

posts.notes: Minimal caption variant — short provocative question paired with high-quality portrait, inspired by leahyunaxo viral pattern

posts.text: She stepped out in a silk ivory midi dress with a structured blazer draped over her shoulders — effortless elegance meets AI-powered design. The future of fashion is already here. #AIbeauty #AIart #AImodel

image_prompt.prompt: AI-generated fashion editorial photo, beautiful young woman wearing an ivory silk midi dress with a structured black blazer draped over shoulders, standing on a marble staircase in a modern minimalist building, natural daylight streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows, high fashion pose, Vogue editorial style, clean composition, luxury aesthetic, 8k photorealistic
image_prompt.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, deformed, oversaturated, cluttered background, low quality, watermark
image_prompt.style_reference: Vogue editorial, minimalist luxury fashion photography

posts.notes: Descriptive caption variant — two sentences describing the outfit concept and AI fashion angle, testing engagement against minimal captions

posts.text: Lost in a dream of neon and cherry blossoms. #AIbeauty #AIart #digitalart

image_prompt.prompt: Artistic AI-generated portrait, beautiful woman standing under a canopy of glowing cherry blossom trees at night, neon pink and violet light reflections on her face, cyberpunk meets Japanese spring aesthetic, rain-wet streets reflecting neon signs, cinematic moody atmosphere, volumetric lighting, dreamy ethereal mood, hyperdetailed, 8k
image_prompt.negative_prompt: daylight, plain background, cartoon, deformed, low resolution, watermark, text
image_prompt.style_reference: cyberpunk aesthetic mixed with traditional Japanese spring, Blade Runner meets Kyoto

posts.notes: Minimal caption variant — short evocative phrase for artistic category, letting the visuals do the storytelling

posts.text: Spring is coming and she's already dressed for it. AI-generated beauty meets seasonal style — pastel palettes and soft florals taking over this March. Who else is ready for spring aesthetics? #AIbeauty #AIart #AIgirl

image_prompt.prompt: AI-generated beauty portrait, young woman in a pastel lavender floral dress standing in a blooming spring garden, soft diffused natural light, cherry blossoms and wisteria in the background, gentle breeze in her hair, warm pastel color palette of pink lavender and soft green, dreamy spring atmosphere, editorial photography style, 8k photorealistic
image_prompt.negative_prompt: winter, dark tones, harsh lighting, cartoon, anime, deformed, watermark, text overlay
image_prompt.style_reference: spring editorial photography, pastel fashion campaign, romantic garden setting

posts.notes: Descriptive caption variant — trend-reactive post about spring aesthetics, multi-sentence description with engagement question

reply_templates: The lighting in this is absolutely unreal — love how it catches the highlights.
This color palette is everything. So dreamy.

The detail on the fabric texture is insane. AI keeps getting better.
This gives such ethereal vibes. Beautiful work.
